src_embedding_text: source: design test case id: tc-homenavigation-002 title: access menu navigation module: homenavigation source files or pages: 3 covered methods: preconditions: user is logged in and on the home page. test data: - user input for menu access (yes/no) - user input for profile access (yes/no) - user input for guide access (yes/no) test steps: 1. start at the home page. 2. check if the user wants to access the menu. 3. if yes, proceed to check for profile access. 4. if profile access is granted, display profile information. 5. if profile access is denied, check for guide access. 6. if guide access is granted, display the guide. 7. if neither profile nor guide access is granted, end the process. expected result: - if the user accesses the menu and grants profile access, profile information should be displayed. - if the user accesses the menu and denies profile access but grants guide access, the guide should be displayed. - if the user denies both profile and guide access, the process should end without displaying any content. unit: project:
